context.task_description:
Elicit and document requirements for the Remote Overlay Abstraction.
PRIMARY INPUT: specs/merge-coding-standards/REMOTE-OVERLAY-PLAN.md
Also reference: specs/merge-coding-standards/remote-overlay-mcp-architecture-codex.md
Also reference: specs/merge-coding-standards/hybrid-mcp-sidecar-strategy-codex.md
Also reference: constitution.md for scope, NFRs, and constraints.

Produce structured FR and NFR files covering:
- OverlayProvider interface and provider types (Local, MCP)
- OverlayDecision normalized verdict contract
- McpClientWrapper and MCP overlay protocol (overlay.invoke)
- Provider chain construction and composition rules
- Config schema (overlay_backends, remote_overlays)
- CANCELLED task state addition
- Engine verdict mapping
- Remote failure handling (skip/warn/fail_closed)
- Observability events for remote overlay lifecycle

notes: Requirements already produced in specs/remote-overlay-abstraction/ (FR-001 through FR-009 and NFR-001 through NFR-004). Proceeding to design-l1.
